info.title: Khazana POS API
info.description:
## Khazana POS Backend API

Available modules:
- **Auth** – Login, profile, change password
- **Users** – User management and role assignment
- **POS Products** – Active items with live prices for the POS terminal (from Item_Information + t_Price)
- **POS Sales** – Quick cash billing: create invoice, list, print (writes t_SOMstr + t_SODet, deducts inventory)
- **Sales** – Cash, credit, VAT cash, VAT credit sales
- **Inventory** – Items, stock receive / issue / adjust
- **Customers** – Customer management, ledger, payments
- **Roles** – Role management
- **Menus** – Menu items
- **Permissions** – Role-based permissions
- **Orders** – Sales orders (regular and VAT)
- **Pricing** – Sale prices and cost prices
- **Finance** – Money receive and cash purchases
- **Packets** – Packet stock management
- **NC Adjustment** – Non-conformance adjustments
- **Assortment** – Assortment records
- **Reports** – Sales, stock, item-wise, customer statements
- **Admin** – Branches, settings, banks, audit log
- **Dashboard** – Summary statistics
- **Categories** – Item category management

branchId.description: UUID of the branch the user belongs to

AdjustStockDto.description: Multi-line stock adjustment. Each line carries reject/excess/short/assort for one item.

TransferStockDto.description: Transfer stock between branches (records an issue from the source and a receive at the destination per line).

PosProduct.description: Item_Information row joined with its current active t_Price entry. Only items that have at least one active price are returned.

CreatePosSaleDto.description: Backend resolves item prices and VAT from t_Price. Client never sends rates.

PosSaleItem.description: Mapped from t_SODet joined with Item_Information

total.description: Gross line total before VAT (sodetAmount = rate × qty)

PosSale.description: Mapped from t_SOMstr + t_SODet + Item_Information. Invoice numbers use DS-YYYYMM-NNNNN prefix.

vatAmount.description: Sum of sodetVATAmount across all lines

200.description: Returns access token and user profile

401.description: Invalid credentials or user not assigned to the given branch

post.summary: Verify email address using token from verification link

200.description: Verification link sent if email is registered
Verification link sent if email is registered

post.summary: Request a 6-digit password reset code sent to email

200.description: Reset code sent if email is registered (always 200 to prevent enumeration)

post.summary: Validate 6-digit password reset code from email

200.description: Code verified — user can now call reset-password

post.summary: Set a new password after verifying reset code

newPassword.description: Min 8 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a number

400.description: Invalid code, expired session, or password too weak

get.summary: Get all sales (filtered by type and branch)
Get current stock levels by branch
Get stock balance for an item

post.summary: Record a payment (client code in body)

get.summary: Get all permissions for a role

200.description: List of permissions for the role

post.summary: Create or update a single permission
Bulk create/update permissions for a role

get.summary: Get sale prices (optionally filter by item code)

patch.summary: Update a sale price by ID

get.summary: Get current active price for an item on a given date

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date to check price (ISO 8601, defaults to today)

get.summary: Get cost prices (optionally filter by item code)

patch.summary: Update a cost price by ID

200.description: Paginated list of money receive records

post.summary: Record a money receipt from customer

get.summary: Get sales report for a date range
Get current stock report for all items
Get item-wise sales report for a date range
Get customer statement for a date range
Get packet analysis report for a date range

get.description: Public endpoint — no authentication required. Used by the login page to populate the branch dropdown.

get.summary: Get all items available at POS terminal
get.description: Returns Item_Information rows that have at least one currently active t_Price entry (priceIsActive=1, date range covers today). Price and VAT % are taken from t_Price. Manage items via Inventory → Items and prices via Pricing → Price Setup.

post.summary: Create a POS sale and generate invoice
post.description: Resolves item prices and VAT from t_Price, calculates all totals server-side, writes one t_SOMstr record and one t_SODet row per cart line, then deducts inventory. Returns the mapped PosSale invoice object. Invoice numbers follow the pattern DS-YYYYMM-NNNNN.

201.description: Invoice created — redirect to /pos/invoice/{id} for print

400.description: Validation error — cart empty, item not found, no active price, or insufficient payment

get.description: Returns t_SOMstr rows whose somstrCode starts with 'DS-', ordered newest-first. Each entry includes its t_SODet lines with Item_Information names.

get.summary: Get a POS sale by ID (for invoice print)
get.description: Fetches one t_SOMstr record by UUID, joins t_SODet + Item_Information, and returns the full PosSale invoice shape. Used by the frontend invoice print page.

tags.name: POS Products
tags.description: Active items with live prices for the POS terminal (read from Item_Information + t_Price)

tags.name: POS Sales
tags.description: Quick cash billing — creates t_SOMstr + t_SODet, deducts inventory, returns printable invoice (DS-YYYYMM-NNNNN)

tags.name: Sales
tags.description: Cash, credit, and VAT sales transactions
